positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a crescent moon cradling a group of whimsical, glowing constellations. The style is modern celestial etching combined with vaporwave gradients, executed with fine line work and thick, solid silhouette elements. Dominant colors are deep indigo, sapphire blue, luminous cyan, and subtle gold accents. The composition must be centered and highly detailed, designed for a perfect square print. The moon and stars should have a smooth, geometric quality, giving the illusion of floating cosmic dust and liquid light. Clean lines are paramount. High contrast, vector quality, perfect for screen printing on t-shirts.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, grainy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, poorly drawn, noisy, photographic, realistic, oil painting
